hook: Interesting conversation often comes from better noticing, not just better lines.
body: When you pay closer attention to tone, contrast, mood, and detail, you have more real material to work with.

hook: Some men treat conversation like a sequence of topics instead of a living exchange with texture.
body: Observation gives you more authentic openings than memorization ever will.

body: Commenting on the energy of the moment can create more connection than asking another generic life-history question.

body: Practice naming one specific thing you notice in the interaction itself instead of defaulting to another stock prompt.
